scripts.premonitor: powershell -Command "$p=(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).OwningProcess; if($p){Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue}; Write-Host 'Puerto 8081 liberado'"
scripts.monitor: start "Freshy - Expo" cmd /k "expo start" && start "Freshy - Backend" cmd /k "cd ../backend-freshy && pip install -r requirements.txt -q && uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000" && timeout /t 4 /nobreak >nul && set PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 && pip install opencv-python openai numpy -q && python ../tools/space_monitor_test.py
